ksa_text: Skill in designing data pipeline monitoring systems, including health dashboard configuration, automated alerting thresholds, SLA baseline setting, and anomaly detection for data freshness, completeness, and volume.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to develop dashboards to better visualize data

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of performance tuning tools and techniques

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Operations & Program Management is an edge domain for the Director of Data Governance, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.452) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Operations & Program Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.452). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Data Governance versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: PMI, TOGAF operational frameworks, and CDO survey data (NewVantage Partners) confirm operational program management as a key competency for data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: while the domain is relevant, this specific skill KSA is better attributed to a more specialized adjacent role. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Initially included but overturned through adversarial review. Operations & Program Management skill KSA does not meet the quality or scope threshold for the Director of Data Governance after cross-framework validation.
